item.title: Start Here page
item.intent: /start-here must orient first-time visitors by interest area with curated entry points into existing content — if you care about security start here, if you want the full thesis start from installment 1. No visitor should feel lost.
item.description: A curated entry point page that groups existing content by reader interest (security, orchestration, full thesis, etc.). Links to specific series installments, commentary posts, and KB entries. Must work even with limited published content — use draft content for structure.
steps: Create src/pages/start-here.astro using Base layout with prose container

Define 3-5 interest areas as a static array of objects with title, hook, and hardcoded href/label pairs — do NOT use getPublishedCollection or conditional content resolution; links on a Start Here page must always render

For each area render the section heading, 1-2 sentence hook, and the list of links — links are static hrefs like /series/agent-infra-maturation-01, /commentary/ai-agent-credential-access, /architecture/persistent-agent-model
Add to site navigation (Nav component) if a nav component exists
Ensure each hardcoded href points to a route that actually builds (verify against the routes list in the build output)

acceptanceCriteria.text: Page contains links to series content
Page contains links to commentary content
Page contains links to architecture content
